## Host

Name the agent host or CLI.

## Dispatch capability

Describe how this host sends work to agents, tasks, workers, or subagents.

## Proposed behavior

Explain how Your Prompt Engineer should prepare, confirm, or dispatch prompts in this host.

## References

Link to docs or examples when available.
